sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking colored blocks in the cycles to see if they change the board
# Try clicking blocks at various positions

test_positions = [
    (17, 23), (17, 26), (17, 29), (17, 32), (17, 35),  # Row 17
    (26, 17), (26, 20), (26, 23), (26, 26), (26, 29),  # Row 26
    (35, 17), (35, 20), (35, 23), (35, 26), (35, 29),  # Row 35
    (20, 23), (23, 23), (29, 23), (32, 23),  # Col 23
    (20, 35), (23, 35), (29, 35), (32, 35),  # Col 35
]

for row, col in test_positions:
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': row, 'col': col}])
    if last_action_result.get('board_changed'):
        print(f"Board changed after clicking ({row}, {col})!")
        break
    else:
        print(f"({row},{col}): no change")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
